name: AppSumo Read-Only Summary - Agiled + AITable (DRAFT, DISABLED)

meta.repo_status: draft-only; not created live by DIG-36
meta.required_review: manual notification-only run before cron or writeback

nodes.name: Set Runtime Config
nodes.notes: Keep emit_raw_records=false. This workflow is summary-only.

nodes.name: Agiled Users Summary (GET only)
nodes.notes: Requires AGILED_API_KEY in n8n runtime env or credential-injected environment. Do not print raw records.

nodes.name: Agiled Projects Summary (GET only)
nodes.notes: Low frequency only; Agiled can 429 repeated smoke checks.

nodes.name: AITable Spaces Summary (GET only)
nodes.notes: Requires current AITABLE_API_KEY. DIG-35 found credential-source drift; verify n8n credential before host changes.

nodes.name: Normalize Data-Minimized Results
nodes.notes: Drops sample/raw body and keeps only aggregate connector health fields.

nodes.name: Build Operator Digest
nodes.notes: Digest is safe for notification after manual review.

nodes.name: Notify Operator (configure credential)
nodes.notes: Replace with Email/Slack/Discord node after credential setup. Keep Paperclip/GitHub writeback disabled until a notification-only run is reviewed.
